description: Free world country data — population, capital, currencies, languages, flags, borders, area, timezones, calling codes. No API key. Open-source community-maintained.

by-name.notes: Search by country name (partial match). Add ?fullText=true for exact, ?fields=name,capital,population to limit response.

by-region.notes: All countries in a region (Africa, Americas, Asia, Europe, Oceania).

by-currency.notes: Countries using a given currency code (BRL, USD, EUR).

by-language.notes: Countries that speak a language (portuguese, english, mandarin).

all.notes: All 250 countries. REQUIRED: ?fields=name,population,... — calling /all without fields returns 400.
